registration.uiPath: Admin > Extensions & Integrations > Integrations > Notification Webhooks
registration.apiEndpoint: POST /V1.0/{Entity}WebhookConfiguration (per entity, e.g. /TicketWebhookConfiguration). Separate endpoints configure which fields trigger (/TicketWebhookField) and which are excluded from the payload (/TicketWebhookExcludedResource).

signing.optionalBasicAuth: Webhook config can additionally require HTTP Basic username/password on the receiving URL

transport.batching: Yes — Autotask may POST an array of entity change events in a single request when multiple events fire within a short window. The payload may be a single object OR an array of objects.
transport.ordering: Not guaranteed. Use SequenceNumber to detect out-of-order deliveries.
transport.retries: Autotask retries with exponential backoff for up to 48h on non-2xx responses, then disables the webhook.

notes: Payload envelope schema is described in Autotask's 'Notification Webhooks' help section. The Entity subobject shape matches what GET /{Entity}/{id} returns.
All sample payloads in this directory are synthesized from the documented envelope + representative GET responses. Field values are illustrative.
